title: The Legend of Herobrine - Spring to Life Compat
description: Adds Spring to Life Backport compatibility to The Legend of Herobrine
body:
# The Legend of Herobrine - Spring to Life Compatibility

Adds Spring to Life Backport compatibility to The Legend of Herobrine.

Adds warm and cold variants of Infected Pig, Infected Cow, and Infected Chicken.

**Homepage:** https://herobrinemod.com

**Main Modrinth Page:** https://modrinth.com/mod/the-legend-of-herobrine

**Spring to Life Backport:** https://modrinth.com/mod/spring-to-life-backport
